name: Avory Room
description: Original wide-plank hardwood floors and low-slung, sloped plaster ceilings evoke a peaceful, nostalgic atmosphere.
Vintage Comfort: Features two matching antique iron and brass twin beds dressed in timeless, geometric patchwork quilts.
Rustic Elements: Original wide-plank hardwood floors and low-slung, sloped plaster ceilings evoke a peaceful, nostalgic atmosphere.
Charming Details: A classic multi-pane window overlooks the lush green gardens, complete with a vintage washbasin and pitcher resting on the sill to capture the perfect morning light.

name: Brunning Room
description: Immerse yourself in moody, vintage elegance in this beautifully appointed guest room, where classic design meets deep, comforting tones.

Moody & Sophisticated Palette: The room wraps you in luxury with dark, patterned teal or navy toile wallpaper that perfectly matches the painted ceiling and window trim, creating a cohesive, intimate atmosphere.
Double the Comfort: Features two matching beds with deep blue upholstered headboards.
Rich Wood Accents: A stunning antique wooden dresser sits prominently between a bed and the large window, beautifully complementing the warmth of the polished hardwood floors.
amenities: Private bathroom with bathtub and headshower

name: Blue Room
description: Bright, serene, and bursting with classic cottagecore elegance, this guest room balances blues with warm, natural wood tones to create the ultimate restful escape.

Botanical & Beadboard Accents: The upper walls are dressed in a delicate, white-and-blue leafy botanical wallpaper, perfectly grounded by deep teal-blue beadboard wainscoting that wraps around the room.
Cozy Seating Nook: To the side, a small bistro area provides a sunny spot to enjoy breakfast.
Charming Details: Matching light wood nightstands, a woven-base bedside lamp, simple neutral Roman shades, and a classic framed landscape print above the bed add an authentic, historical feel.

name: Grand Deluxe
description: Steeped in atmospheric, old-world luxury and regal character, this expansive master suite blends dramatic jewel tones with classic mid-century and antique elements for a truly grand escape.
An exceptional choice for guests seeking a spacious, nostalgic sanctuary brimming with dramatic design and historical flair.
Regal Paneled Walls: The suite is enveloped in rich, deep teal walls accented by classic grid molding and elegant gold filigree trim, creating a stately, gallery-like ambience.

Charming Mid-Century Accents: A long, retro wooden credenza topped with a green runner provides ample heritage charm, beautifully illuminating an array of ornate, and gold-framed artwork and historic photographs.

name: Magnolia Room
description: Exuding country-inn aesthetic, this spacious room combines soothing earth tones with classic cottage elements to create a restful haven for family or friends traveling together.
Sunlit and Scenic: Multiple large double-hung windows flood the room with morning light and offer peaceful views of the surrounding autumn greenery, softened by long, neutral drapery panels.
Earthy & Floral Accents: The walls showcase a charming combination of delicate, small-print floral wallpaper on the upper half, beautifully balanced by muted mauve-brown vertical wood paneling below.
amenities: Private bathroom with bathtub and showerhead

name: Sophie Room
description: Steeped in stately elegance and classic character, this room balances rich, heirloom wood craftsmanship with soft, historical blue-green tones for a regal yet comforting retreat.
The Canopy Masterpiece: A magnificent, dark wood four-poster canopy bed takes center stage, featuring carved wooden pillars and a paneled ceiling frame.
Warm Heirloom Elements: Beautiful, polished wide-plank hardwood floors bring immense warmth to the space, complemented perfectly by a substantial wooden blanket chest.
Cozy Parlor Seating: A sunlit corner serves as an intimate sitting area to enjoy morning coffee.
